stories.title: The Invisible File
stories.subject: The Story of Samuel George
stories.desc: A Nigerian immigrant arrives in London with clean papers and a legitimate life. A file — built by algorithm from a single family association — arrived before he did. A story about the systems that condemn before they accuse.

stories.title:
The Weight of
a Borrowed Name
stories.subject: The Story of Samuel George — Chapter Four
stories.desc: Samuel has survived the file, the algorithms, the informants. But the self he has never shown anyone is the one that finally breaks cover — on a summer afternoon in Soho, among strangers who looked like freedom.

stories.title:
The Woman Who
Kept the Record
stories.desc: A civil servant discovers an anomaly in a dataset. What she does next reshapes everything around her — including the people she trusted most.

stories.title:
Every Congregation
Has a Listener
stories.desc: Inside a South London church, trust is the currency and someone is spending it on behalf of people the congregation has never met.
